Jane Smith

Researcher and developer focused on distributed systems and machine learning infrastructure. Building tools that help teams ship faster.

Experience

Senior Engineer

Acme Corp

2022 - Present

Led migration of monolithic architecture to microservices, reducing deployment times by 60%. Designed and implemented distributed caching layer serving 10M requests per day.

Software Engineer

StartupCo

2019 - 2022

Built real-time data pipeline processing 500K events per second. Implemented ML model serving infrastructure with sub-10ms latency requirements.

Junior Developer

WebDev Agency

2017 - 2019

Developed full-stack web applications for enterprise clients. Introduced automated testing practices that improved code coverage from 30% to 85%.

Publications

Optimizing Cache Invalidation in Distributed Systems

Smith, J.; Chen, L.; Patel, R.

Published in ACM Computing Surveys, March 2024

Novel approach to cache coherence using probabilistic data structures, achieving 95% hit rates with 40% less memory overhead.

Low-Latency ML Inference at Scale

Smith, J.; Rodriguez, M.

Conference Paper, MLSys 2023

Framework for deploying transformer models with predictable tail latencies under varying load conditions.

Education

MS Computer Science

State University, 2017

Thesis on distributed consensus algorithms for heterogeneous networks.

BS Computer Science

Tech College, 2015

Graduated with honors. Focus on algorithms and data structures.

Skills

Python, Go, Rust, Kubernetes, Distributed Systems, Machine Learning, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka
